title: Isen Asteroid Belts
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Isen Asteroid Belts''' were three [[asteroid field]]s located in the [[Isen system/Legends|Isen system]]. The first two, [[Kisen]] and [[Kossan]], circled [[Isen (star)|Isen]] in the first two orbital positions. The third, [[Kossim]], lay in the fourth orbital position. The Asteroids were full of minerals and ores of great value.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'' {{1stID|Isen Asteroid Belts}}
